name: Chocolate Caramel Pecan Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 2 packages (8 ounces each) Cream cheese, softened
recipeInstructions:
BASE: Combine the crumbs and margarine; press onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes.
BODY: In a 1 1/2 quart heavy saucepan, melt the caramels with milk over low heat, stirring frequently until smooth. Pour over the crust. Top with pecans. Combine the cream cheese, sugar, and vanilla in a mixing bowl; mix on medium speed until well blended. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Blend in chocolate. Pour over pecans. Bake at 350°F for 40 minutes. Loosen cake from the rim of the pan; cool before removing the rim of the pan. Chill. Garnish with whipped cream and additional finely chopped pecans, if desired.
